MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY'S MOTION ON ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JUNE 24, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. PER LOCAL RULE 2.6B, MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 10, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-24-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-30-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY'S MOTION ON ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER OF JUNE 10, 2014, ORDERING PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES TO DEPT. 501. PLAINTIFF ALSO FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULES 2.6B. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Application And Claim For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Payment Of Interest Thereon
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raffy Boulgourjian, Esq. (818-476-0107) for Claimant/ Moving party Sonya Miller.
No other Appearance.

Moving party does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT SONYA MILLNER's Application And Claim For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Payment Of Interest Thereon is GRANTED. The Clerk of the Court shall remit to claimant $26,717, plus accrued interest, if any. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. No opposition received.Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY's Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is Off Calendar. Plaintiff failed to comply with the Court's order of June 10, 2014, ordering Plaintiff to deliver courtesy copies to Dept. 501. Plaintiff also failed to comply with SF Local Rules 2.6B. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY's motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on June 24, 2014 at 9:30 am. Per Local Rule 2.6B, moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 10, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
